text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a new year, and Narita Taishin's challenges as
a classic year racer have finally begun!
choice_data_list: (It's always so hard to get ahold of Taishin...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But this year will be an important one, and I want
to take the opportunity to celebrate the occasion
with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I keep that determination burning in my heart
and, once I finish decorating the office, head out
to find Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? Taishin?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I saw her wandering off somewhere before
lunch!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But it doesn't look like she's back yet!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Noooo! Don't be sad! Oh, gosh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Um, um!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ah, I know! She might be taking a nap over there!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yawn... I slept like a lo—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What the?! How long have you been here?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: And how'd you know I was here to begin with?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, that bonehead... She always interrupts my
naps, and now she's snitching about my hiding
spots?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That's it. Next time, I'm gonna kick some sense
into her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: So? What do you want?
choice_data_list:
I was thinking we could make a New Year's
resolution together.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Gross. Hard pass.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm starving, and she won't even throw me a bone!
But if I let this get to me, I won't last as her
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the very least, it'd be nice to spend New Year's
with her, so I try to suggest something that will
pique her interest.
choice_data_list:
Let's sit under a kotatsu table and play some
racing games!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Talk about coming out of left field...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Eh, I guess it's still better than making a
resolution or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since Narita Taishin enjoys playing video games,
I'm able to snag her—hook, line, and sinker. I
quickly set up the kotatsu in my office.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our gaming session gets underway, when...
choice_data_list:
(I can't believe I lost ten out of ten games...
She's crushing me!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Don't just use your items randomly. You gotta
think when the best timing is.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Your cornering's not bad, so why don't you switch
to a car with higher speed stats?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ew. What're you getting all emotional on me for?
I'm only giving you advice because I'm getting
bored!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not without a few bumps and hurdles, but we
end up having a pretty fun New Year's together.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Absolutely not. I came here because I wanted to nap alone.
choice_data_list: Do you take afternoon naps here often?
Do you take afternoon naps here often?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Why the heck are you asking? What, are you
trying to police what I do on my own time?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But for your information, yeah, I do. I like
napping. Sleeping lets me escape all the annoying
stuff in the world.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: And it helps me grow tall—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I mean... nothing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A sudden gust of cold air rushes past us.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Achoo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh.
choice_data_list:
It's cold, so why don't you continue your nap in
my office instead?

It's cold, so why don't you continue your nap in
my office instead?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Fine. But only this once.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I watch over Narita Taishin as she pulls a
blanket over her head and curls up like a kitten
on the sofa in my office.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You wanna talk about training? Yeah, I guess
that's fine.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well, let's hurry to your office, then.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, geez. What's with all the decorations?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Did you do all this to celebrate New Year's or
something?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Fine. Break out the holiday snacks.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Get a move on before I change my mind.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You expect anyone to hold a meeting here with
the room like this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin finally gives in to the festive mood,
and we spend a fun New Year's together.
